reason: Backend quality verification starts from the backend spec index.
Verify backend permission parity, root test boundary, and runtime contracts.
Verify authorization and schema validation errors remain API-safe.
Verify no sensitive mail/log/weak-password data enters audit/application logs.
Verify backend tests, typecheck, and quality checklist.
Frontend quality verification starts from the frontend spec index.
Verify every new surface follows task-specific route, MSW, and sensitive-display contracts.
Verify components use explicit state, permission, empty, and error branches.
Verify query keys, mutations, invalidation, and polling behavior.
Verify sensitive temporary state is not persisted or globally cached.
Verify zod mirrors and no unsafe type bypasses.
Verify MSW handlers parse responses and mutate db through handlers.
Verify frontend typecheck/test/build/lint and required UI tests.
Review cross-layer flow and contract coverage.
